CustomField.formula:
"Pending Documents: " &
TEXT( IF(GST_Document_Uploaded__c = false,1,0) +
IF(PAN_Document_Uploaded__c = false,1,0) +
IF(RERA_Document_Uploaded__c = false,1,0) +
IF(Aadhar_Document_Uploaded__c = false,1,0) +
IF(Address_Proof_Document_Uploaded__c = false,1,0) +
IF(Cancel_Cheque_Document_Uploaded__c = false,1,0) +
IF( ISPICKVAL(Entity_Type__c , "Company"), IF(Company_Registration_Document_Uploaded__c = false,1,0), 0 ) +
IF( ISPICKVAL(Entity_Type__c , "Company"), IF( AND( Authorization_Letter_Document_Uploaded__c = false, Board_Resolution_Document_Uploaded__c = false ), 1, 0 ), 0 ) )
&
" | Completed Documents: " &
TEXT(
IF(GST_Document_Uploaded__c = true,1,0) +
IF(PAN_Document_Uploaded__c = true,1,0) +
IF(RERA_Document_Uploaded__c = true,1,0) +
IF(Aadhar_Document_Uploaded__c = true,1,0) +
IF(Address_Proof_Document_Uploaded__c = true,1,0) +
IF(Cancel_Cheque_Document_Uploaded__c = true,1,0) +
IF( ISPICKVAL(Entity_Type__c , "Company"), IF(Company_Registration_Document_Uploaded__c = true,1,0), 0 ) +
IF( ISPICKVAL(Entity_Type__c , "Company"), IF( OR( Authorization_Letter_Document_Uploaded__c = true, Board_Resolution_Document_Uploaded__c = true ), 1, 0 ), 0 ) )
CustomField.label: Document Status
